initialGoal: Enhance git integration - show uncommitted changes, add push/pull functionality
actualOutcome: Enhanced git integration - added Changes tab showing uncommitted files, commit message input with auto-stage, push/pull buttons. Two-tab interface (Changes/History). Git workflow now complete within Pane. Also built and shipped terminal mode from earlier session. Production build ready.
